top_signals.title: Deutsche Bank Raises 10-Year Treasury Yield Forecast on Fed View
top_signals.summary: Interest-rate strategists at Deutsche Bank AG boosted their forecast for the 10-year Treasury yield into the end of the year on the expectation that Federal Reserve officials now led by Chairman Kevin Warsh are finished cutting interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
top_signals.summary: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Tech Download: How chip companies are looking to use light to solve this major AI bottleneck
top_signals.summary: Nvidia is investing billions into companies developing photonics, which industry watchers say could bring big efficiency gains to the AI sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump to decide imminently on Iran deal, says Hormuz Strait must open - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump to decide imminently on Iran deal, says Hormuz Strait must open  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Postal Service proposes requiring states to provide mail-in ballot voter lists
top_signals.summary: USPS issued the proposal one day after a judge declined to block Trump’s mail-voting order, allowing implementation efforts to continue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
